name: DUOS TECHNOLOGIES GROUP, INC.
summary: Duos Technologies Group, Inc. (DUOT) is a Jacksonville, Florida-based company operating through three subsidiaries: Duos Technologies, Inc. (intelligent inspection/analytics), Duos Edge AI, Inc. (modular Edge Data Centers and infrastructure solutions), and Duos Energy Corporation (energy consulting). The company delivers AI-driven technologies, edge computing infrastructure, manufacturer-agnostic supply chain sourcing, and energy services targeting education, healthcare, enterprise, public sector, and data center markets. It employs approximately 84 people across engineering, software development, operations, and project management.
